message:
feat(sentinel): add Phase 3 pub/sub discovery module

Implement hello message gossip protocol and auto-discovery:

discovery.rs:
- HelloMessage encode/parse for __sentinel__:hello channel
- create_hello_message() builds messages from state
- process_hello_message() -> DiscoveryAction enum
- apply_discovery_action() updates state with new sentinels/master addr
- parse_replica_info_from_master() extracts slaves from INFO output
- discover_replicas_from_info() adds/updates slave instances
- prune_stale_sentinels() removes unreachable sentinels

All 40 unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
